title: Sponsorship Agreement Holder (SAH) Change of Contact Form (IMM 0193) - Canada.ca
content:
## Sponsorship Agreement Holder (SAH) Change of Contact Form (IMM 0193)
Sponsorship Agreement Holder (SAH) Change of Contact Form [IMM 0193] (PDF, 1.89 MB)

### How to download, save and open this form
- Use your computer. The form may not open on tablets or mobile phones .
- Save the form on your computer in a place you can remember. For most Internet browsers, clicking on the link above will automatically download the form. If the form doesn’t automatically download, right-click on the link and select “Save as.”
- For most Internet browsers, clicking on the link above will automatically download the form.
- If the form doesn’t automatically download, right-click on the link and select “Save as.”
- After you download the form, open it using Adobe Acrobat Reader.

#### Open this form in Acrobat Reader
- Open Acrobat Reader. You need Acrobat Reader version 10 or higher to open our forms. Get the latest version of Acrobat Reader .
- You need Acrobat Reader version 10 or higher to open our forms.
- Get the latest version of Acrobat Reader .
- Select “ File ” from the top menu.
- Find the location where you saved the form, click on the file, and click “ Open. ”
Read the step by step instructions on how to complete the form.

### Sponsorship Agreement Holder (SAH) Change of Contact Form (IMM 0193)

### Section 1 – Organization Information
If you are making changes to the SAH’s contact information, select “Yes”
- Type the name of the SAH
- Enter all current contact information for the SAH organization (including the new
                                information)
If you are not making changes to the SAH’s contact information, select “No”

### Section 2 – Changes to Representatives being Requested
- Select the type of change from the drop-down (add or remove)
- Select the representative you are changing from the drop-down (Agreement Signatory, Main
                                Contact, Signing
                                Authority)
- Type the name, position title, email address and phone number of the representative you
                                are changing
- If a new representative is being added, check off the box to indicate that each document
                                has been included
                                with
                                the request: Proof of Canadian Citizenship, Registered Indian Status or Permanent Residence
                                        status Criminal Record Check (non-vulnerable sector) issued within last 6 months A police information check or vulnerable sector check will also be
                                                accepted but are not
                                                required Completed and signed Sponsor Assessment Form (IMM 5492) (opens in a new tab) “SAH Representative” Training Certificate issued by the Refugee Sponsorship
                                        Training Program (not
                                        required for new Agreement Signatory)
- Proof of Canadian Citizenship, Registered Indian Status or Permanent Residence
                                        status
- Criminal Record Check (non-vulnerable sector) issued within last 6 months A police information check or vulnerable sector check will also be
                                                accepted but are not
                                                required
- A police information check or vulnerable sector check will also be
                                                accepted but are not
                                                required
- Completed and signed Sponsor Assessment Form (IMM 5492) (opens in a new tab)
- “SAH Representative” Training Certificate issued by the Refugee Sponsorship
                                        Training Program (not
                                        required for new Agreement Signatory)
- If another representative needs to be added or removed, click the button to make another
                                change.

### Section 3 – Declaration and Signature
The form must be signed by the authorized Main Contact or Agreement Signatory.
See options for signing the sponsorship forms.
If you are adding a new representative you must include a copy of all documents listed in the
                            form along with
                            your
                            request.
This form must be submitted to the PSR mailbox at IRCC.RASOPSR-PPPROSRA.IRCC@cic.gc.ca from the primary
                            SAH
                            email address and will be used to update the central information on your file. Do
                                not submit this form
                                to
                                ROC-O .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
